name: Mindtickle Revenue Enablement API
what_it_does: Mindtickle REST API for revenue enablement platform combining sales training, coaching, and content management. Enables AI agents to track rep readiness scores, retrieve training completion data, access coaching observations, query content effectiveness analytics, and integrate sales readiness data into CRM and HR workflows.
use_cases: Tracking sales rep readiness and training completion from revenue operations agents
Retrieving coaching observations and feedback from sales management agents
Accessing content effectiveness analytics from marketing operations agents
Integrating Mindtickle readiness data into CRM performance and forecasting agents
not_for: SMB without enterprise revenue team needs
best_when: An enterprise revenue organization using Mindtickle wants AI agents to monitor rep readiness, track training efficacy, and correlate sales enablement with deal outcomes.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Sales rep performance and coaching data is sensitive employee data. Handle per employment law. API access requires Mindtickle enterprise agreement.

auth.notes: Mindtickle API uses API key or OAuth authentication. Enterprise access required. Contact Mindtickle for developer API access. Documentation not publicly available.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only platform. Pricing negotiated with Mindtickle sales.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Sales rep performance, coaching, and readiness data is sensitive employee data
No public MCP server — enterprise API integration required
API documentation is private — only available to enterprise customers
API access requires dedicated Mindtickle enterprise agreement
Readiness scores are proprietary metrics — understand scoring model before building on them
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Sales rep performance and coaching data. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API with private documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee performance and coaching data. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only private API.
